ddls:
CREATE TABLE "beverages" (
  "beverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beverage */,
  "beverage_category" TEXT /* Category to which the beverage belongs (e.g., Coffee, Tea) */,
  "beverage_name" TEXT /* Name of the beverage (e.g., Brewed Coffee, Caffè Latte) */,
  "beverage_prep" TEXT /* Preparation method for the beverage (e.g., Short, Tall) */,
  "beverage_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the beverage */,
  "beverage_ingredients" TEXT /* List of main ingredients */,
  "beverage_allergens" TEXT /* List of potential allergens */,
  "beverage_variety" TEXT /* Varieties of the beverage (e.g., seasonal, limited edition) */,
  "beverage_status" TEXT /* Status of the beverage (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the beverage was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the beverage was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beverages_beverage_prep FOREIGN KEY ("beverage_prep") REFERENCES preparation_methods ("prep_method"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beverages_beverage_category FOREIGN KEY ("beverage_category") REFERENCES beverage_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "beverage_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the beverage category (e.g., Coffee, Tea) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preparation_methods" (
  "prep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preparation method */,
  "prep_method" TEXT /* Description of the preparation method (e.g., Short, Tall) */,
  "prep_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the preparation method */,
  "prep_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Time required to prepare the beverage in minutes */,
  "prep_instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for preparation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., nutritionist, product developer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the beverage data */,
  "beverage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beverage being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_beverage_id FOREIGN KEY ("beverage_id") REFERENCES beverages ("beverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beverage_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the version record */,
  "beverage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beverage associated with this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the recipe or nutritional profile */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beverage_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beverage_versions_beverage_id FOREIGN KEY ("beverage_id") REFERENCES beverages ("beverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beverage_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
